description_long: This is a hardcover book with a dust jacket featuring a vibrant aerial photograph of a large, formal garden landscape, including a stately building, tree-lined avenues, and geometric garden patterns. The front cover is dominated by lush green tones and intricate details of the garden, while the spine is a deep green with a maze-like pattern and white text. The book appears moderately thick, with visible pages and a slightly worn dust jacket. The back cover continues the garden theme, displaying a close-up of a hedge maze. The book sits on a wooden surface, and its overall appearance suggests it is a coffee table or reference book about gardens. The edges of the dust jacket are slightly uneven, indicating some use.
description: A hardcover book with a dust jacket featuring an aerial photograph of a formal garden and a stately building, with green and maze-like patterns on the spine and back.
description_view_0: The back cover is visible, showing a detailed hedge maze pattern and a barcode near the bottom.
description_view_1: The front cover is prominent, displaying an aerial photograph of a large garden and estate, with the title text at the top.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the side, revealing the spine with green coloring, maze patterns, and white text, as well as a glimpse of the front and back covers.
description_view_3: The top-down angle shows the book partially open, exposing the inside of the dust jacket and the tops of the pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is a high-resolution aerial photograph depicting a grand estate surrounded by formal gardens, tree-lined paths, and geometric landscaping. The image is vibrant, with lush greens and detailed architectural features, giving a sense of scale and elegance.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is deep green with a maze-like pattern and features white, vertically oriented text. The design is visually consistent with the garden theme of the cover.
